text.title: Fine-tuning Basics — Techniques and Frameworks Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: Team picks full fine-tune by default.
antipattern.fix: Start with LoRA; only escalate when LoRA + dataset growth fails to close the gap.

antipattern.symptom: Finetune deployed without testing against general benchmarks.
antipattern.root-cause: Eval set focused on the niche task only.
antipattern.fix: Add a 100-example regression set covering common-sense + safety.

antipattern.symptom: New team picks Axolotl for its YAML elegance.
antipattern.fix: Start with Unsloth single-file; revisit Axolotl after 1-2 successful runs.
